sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26926" key="dikata/lhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκατάληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n26926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having two</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καταλήξεις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.23</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope> </bibl>: hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκαταληξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Mar. Vict.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:p.62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.62</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
